offer: For law firm paralegals processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient management of contract signatures causes delays in contract finalization. We digitize and schedule signatures instead of manual tracking and scheduling of signatures via email.
problem: Inefficient management of contract signatures leads to delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm paralegals
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firm paralegals with demo video
Community forums where paralegals share tools
try_it: Let users try digital signature capture on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Make a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
